item.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Get a list of all products.

request.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Get a list of all products.

description.content: Retrieve all products available for purchase, in a single list. Products can be filtered by category by using the `category` query parameter. If a category is not supplied or the category is invalid, all products will be returned.

query.description: Category to filter products by. Should be the name of a category, e.g. `shirts`.

response.name: ProductList is an array of Product objects.

header.description: The number of requests allowed in the current period.

info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries pb33f Giftshop API

description.content:
Want some cool gear, to go with your cool code? We've got you covered. Buy a t-shirt, hoodie or other merchandise from our store to show your support for pb33f.


Contact Support:
 Name: Dave Shanley
 Email: buckaroo@pb33f.io
